# Apple Ads Campaign Management API 3

**Article**

Apple no longer supports this API.

## Overview



### 3.1

Released in May 2020.

Apple Ads Campaign Management API 3 includes:

- Support for Russian currency.
- Two additional required fields for the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-a-Campaign] request payload. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Campaign-Level-Reports].
- [https://searchads.apple.com/help/advanced/0015-understand-bids/] in [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Keyword-Level-Reports].

## Changelog

- **Apple Ads Campaign Management API 5**: Learn about changes to Apple Ads Campaign Management API 5.
- **Apple Ads Campaign Management API 4**: Learn about changes to Apple Ads Campaign Management API 4.
- **Apple Ads Campaign Management API 2**: Apple no longer supports this API.
- **Apple Ads Campaign Management API 1**: Apple no longer supports this API.
